entries.text: Gamepad support — Xbox, PS4/PS5 and generic controllers work out of the box. □/X = 1, △/Y = 2, □+△ / X+Y = 1+2
Session stats modal now shows a scroll indicator on mobile when there is more content below
Changelog window — shows what's new on each update
Ranking mode now always starts with default config regardless of your current settings
Your config is saved before entering ranking and fully restored when you go back to training
"Back to training" now properly resets the game state and prepares the next video
"Start Training" resets all session stats so every session starts clean
Stop button renamed to "Reload Training" for clarity
Initial release — throw break practice for Tekken 8
Free training mode with adjustable speed and fail delay
Session stats with accuracy breakdown by throw type
Session history — last 20 sessions saved locally
PWA — works offline and installable on mobile
